description: Expected outcomes for expert personas (P04-P07). AI agents compare map accuracy to known expertise profiles.

expectations.mapExpectation: Clear green region in neuroscience cluster. Red/yellow in physics/math regions. Visible differentiation between strong and weak areas.
expectations.expertAssessment: Questions in neuroscience should test genuine understanding, not trivia. Expert should recognize topics from their field.

expectations.mapExpectation: Strong green in physics/astrophysics/quantum-physics regions. Math region also green. Biology region strongly red. Sharp contrast between expertise areas.
expectations.expertAssessment: Physics questions should test conceptual understanding. Distractor quality matters most here — a physicist should find all four options plausible at first glance.

expectations.mapExpectation: Green in biology/genetics region. Red in physics. Mobile viewport should still show clear differentiation.
Moderate green in neuroscience/biology. Yellow/red in physics. Overall more mixed than single-domain experts. Map should show meaningful cross-domain variation.
expectations.expertAssessment: The 'all' domain map should have semantically meaningful spatial layout — related topics should be near each other.
